articles.title: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
articles.description: A volunteer diver has described shaking as he filmed his encounter with an endangered Great White shark between Tunisia and Sicily.

articles.title: Christian Eriksen 'in good spirits' after collapsing in Denmark game, team's doctor says
articles.description: Christian Eriksen is "in good spirits" following his collapse against Ukraine and is expected to be discharged from hospital soon, says Denmark's national team doctor Morten Boesen.
